description: Disk I/O spiked above 800 MB/s on a database server during nightly backup.
root_cause: Backup job overlapping with peak query load, saturating disk bandwidth.
fix: Rescheduled backup window and throttled backup I/O priority.

description: CPU usage sustained above 90% for 20 minutes on an application server.
root_cause: A runaway process stuck in an infinite retry loop after a downstream API timeout.
fix: Restarted the affected service and added exponential backoff to the retry logic.

description: Memory usage climbed steadily over 6 hours until the service crashed.
root_cause: Memory leak in a caching layer that never evicted stale entries.
fix: Restarted the service and patched the cache eviction policy.

description: Server temperature exceeded safe thresholds during a heatwave.
root_cause: Cooling fan failure combined with high ambient data center temperature.
fix: Replaced the fan unit and temporarily throttled non-critical workloads.

description: Vulnerability scan flagged an outdated OpenSSL version on multiple servers.
root_cause: Servers were not included in the last automated patch cycle.
fix: Applied the vendor patch and added the servers to the automated patch group.
